# Rahul Rachhoya — AI Engineer

> Portfolio: https://rahulrachhoya.is-a.dev/
> Resume: https://rahulrachhoya.is-a.dev/resume.pdf
> GitHub: https://github.com/RahulRachhoya
> LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rahul-rachhoya/
> Email: rahulrachhoya0@gmail.com

## Who I Am

Rahul Rachhoya is an AI Engineer based in India with 3+ years of experience building
production-grade AI systems using Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented
Generation (RAG), Voice AI, and MLOps on AWS. Currently at Careers360 building voice-based
AI career counseling systems.

## What I Build

- **LLM Systems** — Claude (Anthropic), GPT-4, Mistral, Gemini, LLaMA with fine-tuning (LoRA/PEFT)
- **RAG Pipelines** — FAISS, Pinecone, pgvector, ChromaDB, hybrid search with Cohere reranking
- **Voice AI** — Sarvam AI STT/TTS, real-time streaming, emotion detection
- **Multi-Agent Workflows** — LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, LangChain
- **MLOps & Observability** — AWS Bedrock, LangSmith, Weights & Biases, Prometheus, Grafana
- **Backends** — Python, FastAPI, Django, PostgreSQL, Redis, Supabase

## Key Achievements

- **10K+ Voice AI sessions** served at 88% satisfaction, 1.8s avg response time (Careers360)
- **40% LLM cost reduction** via prompt caching + A/B testing ($0.40 → $0.24/session)
- **28% accuracy improvement** with multi-agent function-calling pipeline
- **92% fine-tune accuracy** on Mistral 7B via LoRA — $50 training vs $2K full retrain
- **35% hallucination reduction** with hybrid RAG (BM25 + vector + Cohere rerank)
- **99.7% uptime** on AWS production deployment at Careers360

## Featured Projects

### Voice AI Career Counselor
End-to-end voice agent using Claude/Bedrock + Sarvam AI (STT/TTS) + pgvector RAG.
Real-time streaming, emotion detection, 10K+ sessions, 88% user satisfaction.
Stack: Claude, AWS Bedrock, Sarvam AI, pgvector, FastAPI, LangSmith

### Multi-Agent Document Intelligence System
4-agent LangGraph system (extraction → validation → summarization → orchestrator).
Processes 500+ documents at 94% accuracy — 75% faster than manual (30min → 7min).
Stack: LangGraph, Python, Function Calling, AWS

### LLM Observability & Cost Optimization Dashboard
End-to-end monitoring: LangSmith + W&B + Prometheus. A/B tested GPT-4 vs Claude
achieving 60% cost savings; prompt caching cut costs 25%; latency improved 41%.
Stack: LangSmith, Weights & Biases, Prometheus, Grafana

### Fine-Tuned Domain LLM (Mistral 7B)
Fine-tuned on 5K domain examples using LoRA/PEFT: 78% → 92% accuracy,
40% latency reduction, $50 training cost vs $2K full retrain. 1,000+ daily inferences.
Stack: Mistral 7B, LoRA, PEFT, Hugging Face, AWS SageMaker

- **System Engineer (AI Context)** | STL Digital Limited, Pune | Jun 2022 – Jul 2024
